system.description:
A three-legged stand that provides a stable platform for bracing a heavy weapon on any relatively flat surface. The tripod requires remaining in a stationary position and fixes the weapon in a 180-degree arc of fire, limiting its usefulness outside of objective defense or ambush scenarios.

Upgrades: Any Heavy Weapon.

Note: The tactical limitations (stationary position, 180-degree arc) must be enforced by the GM during play.
